title: arnica cordifolia subsp. whitneyi
intro: Arnica cordifolia subsp. whitneyi is a subspecies of the perennial flower Arnica cordifolia, native to the western United States and Canada, known for its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant's roots and flowers contain sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it a popular natural remedy for muscle and joint pain. The health benefits of Arnica cordifolia subsp. whitneyi include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Arnica cordifolia subsp. whitneyi can be prepared as a tincture, salve, or cream, which can be applied topically to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation.
